hooks.command: if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec uv run --directory "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/meta" python -m harness.issue_duplicate_guard; fi
if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec uv run --directory "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/meta" python -m harness.commit_guard; fi
if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec uv run --directory "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/meta" python -m harness.answer_first_reminder; fi
